title: SN-RRF-DCRRA v3.0.1 Complete GitHub Repository: Integrated Consolidation of SPARC Residual-Regime Diagnostics
description: Complete GitHub-ready claim-bounded repository package integrating SN-RRF v2.0.1, DCRRA v1.0.1, and the v3.0.1 integrated consolidation manuscript and Phase 0-9 internal deepening outputs. Non-SPARC external residual-level validation remains on data-availability HOLD.
